articles.title: Is XRP spot ETF the next big move for Wall Street?
articles.description: Yassin Mobarak, the founder of Dizercapital, has brought to light Wall Street’s potential interest in establishing an XRP Spot ETF. Mobarak, in a recent tweet, emphasized the unexplored opportunities in the XRP market, suggesting that Wall Street institutions could benefit significantly from investing in such an ETF. His comments come at a time when the […]

articles.title: Bitwise drops commercial for its spot Bitcoin ETF
articles.description: In a bold and strategically-timed move, Bitwise, a San Francisco-based asset manager, has unveiled its latest endeavor to capture the burgeoning cryptocurrency market: a commercial for its spot Bitcoin ETF. This move, signifying a confident step forward in their ongoing application process with the US Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC), marks a pivotal moment in […]

articles.title: Lead Shiba Inu Developer Teases New ‘Partnershib,’ Outlines Plan for SHIB To Be Adopted Worldwide Perpetually
articles.description: Pseudonymous Shiba Inu (SHIB) lead developer Shytoshi Kusama is proposing a strategy to onboard more people into the dog-inspired crypto asset as billions of the memecoin’s tokens are burned. In a series of tweets on social media platform X, Shytoshi Kusama lays out a plan to spur the perpetual global adoption of Shiba Inu. The […]

articles.title: Cardano Founder Gives Reasons Why ADA Can Never Work With XRP
articles.description: Cardano founder, Charles Hoskinson, has once again reasserted his opinion on a potential partnership between XRP and Cardano’s ADA. His recent comment after a member of the XRP community dug up past remarks that the Cardano founder had made on this same subject. Why ADA Will Not Work With XRP In a post on his […]

articles.title: Cardano founder rejects XRP partnership due to community hostility
articles.description: Charles Hoskinson, the founder of Cardano, has reaffirmed his stance against any potential partnerships with XRP, citing community harassment and a lack of technical alignment. This ongoing feud between Hoskinson and the XRP community has been a persistent and divisive issue within the cryptocurrency space. The historical dispute between Cardano and XRP In the world […]

articles.title: Helium Tokens Surge Amid Network Expansion, Solana Saga BONK Mania
articles.description: Following Helium's nationwide U.S. rollout, the Solana-based tokens powering the decentralized 5G network have surged.

articles.description: Cardano founder Charles Hoskinson stands by his critique of XRP, facing backlash from the XRP community while challenging Bitcoin's necessity.

articles.title: Solana Gaming Platform Hacked: 80% Liquidity Lost
articles.description: Aurory gaming on Solana was hit by a major hack, losing 80% in AURY-USDC pool. Team acts fast, disabling SyncSpace to protect funds and stabilize the market.

articles.title: Bitcoin Trading Volume Drops as Holiday Season Draws Near
articles.description: Crypto trading slows as Bitcoin falls below $42,000; market cools off with traders eyeing U.S. ETF approval and holiday season.

articles.title: Crypto Could See a Massive Rugpull if Bitcoin ETFs are Denied: Analyst Warns
articles.description: Analyst warns of major drop if U.S. rejects Bitcoin ETF; market anticipates decision, with Bitcoin reversing towards $40,000.

articles.description: Cardano Founder says no to partnerships with XRP, points at community harassment and lack of technical fit.

articles.title: Solana Saga Sold for 10x the Price on eBay Amid BONK Craze
articles.description: As demand for the phone rises, Solana Saga is fetching bids much higher than its $599 price tag.
